title: Workspace Template for (Wedding) Event Management

posts.author: Mindflows_Jesuena (Jesuena Estoque Reimer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community!

We at https://mindflows.eu are currently building a complete solution for the event industry - more specifically for wedding planning and organization.

We’d love to connect with those who are pros in this field and have a great exchange in order for us to create the most beneficial solution we can build!

If anybody will be interested too, we will also share updates re this development.

Your input will be much appreciated. Thank you!

Jesuena Estoque Reimer
CEO | Senior Monday.com Consultant
Mindflows
https://mindflows.eu
